name: Burning Intellect
descs: After defeating an enemy with a [Combustion] effect, 2 allies with Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency gains 1 [AttackDmgUp] at the next Turn Start.
After defeating an enemy with a [Combustion] effect, 2 allies with Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency gains 2 [AttackDmgUp] at the next Turn Start.
After defeating an enemy with a [Combustion] effect, 3 allies with Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency gains 2 [AttackDmgUp] at the next Turn Start.
